zh.Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rhinela: 德國海藍-普法爾茲海-斯盧可-可萊斯萊寧根
zh.lifeSummary: 當Friedrich I von Saarbrücken於1186年出生在德國薩阿藍德可萊斯 薩爾布呂肯時，他的父親Simon von Saarbrücken II36歲，母親Luitgard von Leiningen30歲。他於大約1205年與Agnes Countess of Eberstein在海因里希_結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1237年在德國海藍-普法爾茲海-斯盧可-可萊斯萊寧根享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Friedrich I von Saarbrücken于1186年出生在德国薩阿藍德可萊斯 薩爾布呂肯时，他的父亲Simon von Saarbrücken II36岁，母亲Luitgard von Leiningen30岁。他于大约1205年与Agnes Countess of Eberstein在海因里希_结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1237年在德国海藍-普法爾茲海-斯盧可-可萊斯萊寧根享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Friedrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

variants.name: Frederick
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

variants.name: Friederich
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Friedrich I von Saarbrücken was born in 1186, in Saarbrücken, Saarland, Germany, his father, Simon von Saarbrücken II, was 36 and his mother, Luitgard von Leiningen, was 30. He married Agnes Countess of Eberstein about 1205, in Prussia. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1237, in Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Friedrich I von Saarbrücken est né en 1186, à Kreis Saarbrücken, La Sarre, Allemagne, son père, Simon von Saarbrücken II, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Luitgard von Leiningen, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Countess of Eberstein environ 1205, à Prusse. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1237, à Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Friedrich I von Saarbrücken 1186 in Kreis Saarbrücken, Saarland, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon von Saarbrücken II 36 und seine Mutter Luitgard von Leiningen 30. Er hat um 1205 in Preußen Agnes Countess of Eberstein geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1237 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich I von Saarbrücken è nato il nel 1186 nel Kreis Saarbrücken, Saarland, Germania, il suo padre, Simon von Saarbrücken II, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Luitgard von Leiningen, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Countess of Eberstein circa 1205, nel Preußen. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1237, nel Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, all'età di 51 anni.

ko.Of, Alt-Leiningen, Pfalz, Bavaria: 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 바드 드u르케임 알틀레이닝
ko.lifeSummary: Friedrich I von Saarbrücken(이)가 1186년 독일 사알랜드 크레이스 사아르브uc켄에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon von Saarbrücken II(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Luitgard von Leiningen(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1205년 프레우ss에서 Agnes Countess of Eberstein(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1237년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 리이-헌스uck-크레이스 레이닝에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich I von Saarbrücken nasceu em 1186, em Kreis Saarbrücken, Saarland, Alemanha, seu pai, Simon von Saarbrücken II, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Luitgard von Leiningen, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Countess of Eberstein aproximadamente 1205, em Preußen. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1237, em Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, com 51 anos.

ru.Of, Alt-Leiningen, Pfalz, Bavaria: алтлининген, ландкрис бад дuрхим, раинланд-пфалз, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Friedrich I von Saarbrücken родился в 1186 г. в местности крис саарбрuккен, саарланд, Германия, его отцу по имени Simon von Saarbrücken II было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Luitgard von Leiningen, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Countess of Eberstein около 1205 г. в местности Пруссия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1237 г. в местности лининген, раин-хунсрuкк-крис, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Friedrich I von Saarbrücken nació en 1186, en Kreis Saarbrücken, Saarland, Alemania, su papá, Simon von Saarbrücken II, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Luitgard von Leiningen, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Agnes Countess of Eberstein aproximadamente 1205, en Preußen. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1237, en Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, a la edad de 51 años.
